snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.payment.get_payment(
    payment_id="payment_id",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.payment.get_payment(
        payment_id="payment_id",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi
from seed.transfer import CreateTransferRequestAttributes

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.transfer.create_transfer(
    attributes=CreateTransferRequestAttributes(
        amount=1,
        source_account_id="source_account_id",
        destination_account_id="destination_account_id",
    ),
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi
from seed.transfer import CreateTransferRequestAttributes

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.transfer.create_transfer(
        attributes=CreateTransferRequestAttributes(
            amount=1,
            source_account_id="source_account_id",
            destination_account_id="destination_account_id",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())
